content.problemStatement:
Suppose a contest has NNN problems, with difficulties A1,A2,...,ANA_1, A_2, ..., A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,...,AN‚Äč, and we have a parameter XXX. The contest is said to be balanced if and only if the following conditions hold :


Ai‚Č•Ai‚ąí1A_i \ge A_{i - 1}Ai‚Äč‚Č•Ai‚ąí1‚Äč for all 2‚Č§i‚Č§N2 \le i \le N2‚Č§i‚Č§N, i.e. the problems are sorted in difficulty order.
Ai‚ąíAi‚ąí1‚Č§XA_i - A_{i - 1} \le XAi‚Äč‚ąíAi‚ąí1‚Äč‚Č§X for all 2‚Č§i‚Č§N2 \le i \le N2‚Č§i‚Č§N, i.e. the difficulties between 222 adjacent problems differ by at most XXX.
Right now, your contest has problems of difficulties B1,B2,...,BNB_1, B_2, ..., B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,...,BN‚Äč. You sorted them in difficulty order, so Bi‚Č•Bi‚ąí1B_i \ge B_{i - 1}Bi‚Äč‚Č•Bi‚ąí1‚Äč holds.

You want to modify the problems to ensure that the contest becomes balanced. Suppose the final contest difficulties were C1,C2,...,CNC_1, C_2, ..., C_NC1‚Äč,C2‚Äč,...,CN‚Äč. Then, the cost of this contest is max‚Ā°i=1N(‚ą£Ci‚ąíBi‚ą£)\max_{i = 1}^{N}(|C_i - B_i|)maxi=1N‚Äč(‚ą£Ci‚Äč‚ąíBi‚Äč‚ą£). Minimize the cost while achieving a balanced contest. It can be proven that a balanaced contest always exists. Please note that problems are even allowed to have negative difficulties.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains NNN and XXX - the size of the array and the parameter.
The second line contains NNN integers - B1,B2,...,BNB_1, B_2, ..., B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,...,BN‚Äč




Output Format
For each test case,




output on a new  line : KKK the minimum cost of a balanced contest




output on the next line : NNN integers, C1,C2,...,CNC_1, C_2, ..., C_NC1‚Äč,C2‚Äč,...,CN‚Äč representing a balanced contest acheiveing the minimum cost KKK. The following conditions should hold for CCC :



‚ąí2‚čÖ109‚Č§Ci‚Č§2‚čÖ109- 2 \cdot 10^9 \le C_i \le 2 \cdot 10^9‚ąí2‚čÖ109‚Č§Ci‚Äč‚Č§2‚čÖ109
Ci‚Č•Ci‚ąí1C_i \ge C_{i - 1}Ci‚Äč‚Č•Ci‚ąí1‚Äč
Ci‚ąíCi‚ąí1‚Č§XC_i - C_{i - 1} \le XCi‚Äč‚ąíCi‚ąí1‚Äč‚Č§X



If several such contests exists, output any.
